meaning: n.吠檀多(古代印度哲学中一直发展至今的唯心主义理论)
examples: We asked him what he meant by Vedanta.
Vedanta argues that the tribal people opposing the mine are a minority.
He is not related to Anil Agarwal, the majority owner of Vedanta, the major Indian miner.
The intention is to move to 58% Vedanta ownership, while Cairn Energy reduces to 22%.
Sterlite, a subsidiary of the UK-based Vedanta mining group, runs a copper smelter in Tuticorin town.
